meta.title: Inquiry board
meta.description: Reach the PromptMarket team — partnerships, bug reports, feedback, and usage questions. Submitted inquiries appear on the public board.

header.title: How can we help?
header.subtitle: Send an inquiry without leaving the site. Submissions appear on the board below, and the team updates their status once reviewed.

form.categoryHint: Pick the closest type — faster triage means a faster answer.
form.titlePlaceholder: Sum up your inquiry in one line
form.bodyPlaceholder: What's on your mind? For bugs, reproduction steps plus expected vs. actual behavior help a lot.
form.emailHint: Leave it and we'll follow up by email. Your email stays private to the team.
form.submitError: Sending failed. Please try again in a moment.

receipt.title: Inquiry received
receipt.subtitle: The team reviews submissions in order. You can find your inquiry on the board below.
receipt.subtitleWithEmail: We'll follow up at {{email}}. You can find your inquiry on the board below.

board.title: Recent inquiries
board.subtitle: Submitted inquiries appear publicly here.
board.emptyDescription: Be the first to leave one. Submitted inquiries appear publicly on this board.
